text: Standing here, enveloped in the cool glow of the neon and surrounded by the language of research and possibility, I feel as if I’m on the threshold of something new. This environment stirs both curiosity and calm within me, as if the air itself hums with the potential of ideas forming. There’s a gentle tension in the contrast between the sterile, mechanical elements and the promise of insight on the other side of the glass. I feel contemplative, aware of the unfinished nature of knowledge, quietly optimistic about what might come next.
